revision.text: -- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} local p = {}; function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while string.len(args[i]) do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end return p

revision.comment: oh, misread doc; thought opposite purpose for template
revision.text: -- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} local p = {}; function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while not string.len(args[i]) do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end return p

-- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} local p = {}; function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while 0 == string.len(args[i]) do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end return p

revision.comment: lua doesn't cast nil into blank strings apparently
revision.text: -- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} local p = {}; function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while args[i] == nil or string.len(args[i]) == 0 do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end return p

revision.comment: test: do I even need these lines?
revision.text: -- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while args[i] == nil or string.len(args[i]) == 0 do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end

revision.comment: Undid revision 639373039 by [[Special:Contributions/Codehydro|Codehydro]] ([[User talk:Codehydro|talk]]) appaarently I do
revision.text: -- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} local p = {}; function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while args[i] == nil or string.len(args[i]) == 0 do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end return p

revision.comment: since this isn't implemented yet... just a quick test...
revert test... don't quite get it right now
simpliy; just noticed the "preview page with this module" box... will no longer be doing weird tests XD
when frame args are relevant, they'll get picked up by Module:Arguments, and when they're not, that's just a waste of CPU cycles
properly handle blanks acting like empties (I'm not sure it's a good idea to do this at all, but if it is, this is how you should do it)
add a tracking category to any pages that use this behavior
Protected Module:If empty: [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
actually, only the first 8 need this check

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:If empty]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
update from sandbox, per [[Template talk:If empty#Backcompat]]
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes
revision.text: -- this is intended to replace {{If empty}} local p = {}; function p.run(frame) local args = require('Module:Arguments').getArgs(frame) local i = 0 args[table.getn(args)] = '' while string.len(args[i]) do i = i + 1 end return args[i] end return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23052491609|manual triggered pipeline]]
